name: Sharefax
description_short: Sharefax is a member-owned credit union serving the Cincinnati, Ohio area with checking, savings, loans, and credit card products.
description_long:
Sharefax Credit Union is a not-for-profit, member-owned financial institution serving the greater Cincinnati, Ohio region. The credit union operates nine physical branch locations across communities including Batavia, Blue Ash, Eastgate, Evendale, Lebanon, Liberty Township, Mason, Milford, and Western Hills, with access to additional shared branching locations nationwide and a network of ATMs.

Sharefax offers a comprehensive suite of consumer financial products including checking and savings accounts, certificates of deposit with published rates, auto loans with refinancing options (currently offering 1.50% off for refinances before May 31st), home loans and HELOCs with $0 closing costs for a limited time, personal loans, student loans, and credit cards (Score Card and Prime Card with recent upgrades). The credit union also provides debt protection through Life Plus, safe deposit boxes, online banking, bill pay, and shared branching access across the nationwide CO-OP network.

Sharefax distinguishes itself through community focus, evidenced by youth financial education programs (Champion Club accounts for youth), a community job board, merchant services for local businesses, and active fraud prevention education. The credit union publishes current rates for savings, checking, IRAs, loans, and certificates on their website, and offers financial wellness programs and resources for members. They provide specific conveniences like skip-a-payment options on loans, fee-free ATM/Debit MasterCard access at PNC bank ATMs, and ID protection services.

As a credit union, Sharefax is limited to serving members in their defined field of membership and geographic service area in Ohio. While they offer competitive products typical of regional credit unions, they lack the branch density of larger national institutions. The website indicates they have zero branches and zero shared branches displayed (likely a technical issue), though nine specific branch addresses are listed. Membership eligibility and specific product terms require direct inquiry.
services: Auto loans and auto loan refinancing
Credit cards (Score Card and Prime Card)
pros: Nine physical branch locations in Cincinnati metropolitan area with extended shared branching network access
Current promotional offers: 1.50% off auto loan refinances (through May 31st) and $0 closing costs on HELOCs and home equity loans
Free ATM access at PNC bank ATMs with Convenience ATM/Debit MasterCard
Comprehensive loan portfolio including auto, home, personal, and student loans with published rate tiers
Member-owned non-profit structure (NCUA-insured) with no shareholder extraction of profits
Youth financial education programs including Champion Club accounts with promotional incentives
Active fraud protection education and scam alerts communicated directly to members
cons: Service area limited to Cincinnati, Ohio region; geographic restriction limits accessibility for non-local members
Website branch/ATM counter displays zero locations (technical error or data issue despite nine listed addresses)
No mention of competitive rates comparison or how rates rank against regional/national competitors
Limited information about membership eligibility criteria or field of membership requirements
No mobile app mentioned on homepage despite 'Online Services' offerings
best_for: Cincinnati-area residents seeking local credit union membership with competitive loan and deposit products
Auto loan refinance borrowers looking for current promotional discounts (1.50% off through May 31st)
Home buyers or homeowners seeking $0 closing cost HELOC or home equity loan options
Young savers and families wanting youth-focused savings accounts with financial education programs
diagnosis: Sharefax is ideal for Cincinnati-area residents seeking membership-based credit union banking with current promotional incentives on home and auto lending. The main caveat is strict geographic service limitation to Ohio; non-local consumers cannot join, and those relocating lose convenient branch access.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
